services.name: Shrink Wrapping Services
services.description: Professional-grade shrink wrapping for heavy machinery, vehicles, and industrial cargo

subServices.name: Close Cargo Shrink Packing
subServices.description: Our Close Cargo Shrink Packing service uses premium 300GSM LD shrink tape to create a tightly sealed, puncture-resistant barrier around goods loaded in closed containers. This method ensures complete weather protection, dust prevention, and tamper-evidence for your valuable cargo during national and international transit.

subServices.name: Open Cargo Shrink Wrapping
subServices.description: Open Cargo Shrink Wrapping is designed for oversized machinery, vehicles, and equipment that cannot fit within standard containers. Our trained professionals apply industrial heat-shrink film directly on open flatbed trailers and cargo decks, creating a durable, UV-resistant protective layer.

subServices.name: Pallet Shrink Wrapping
subServices.description: Pallet Shrink Wrapping secures palletized loads with heat-applied shrink film, ensuring load stability and protection. This method is ideal for bulk shipments and warehouse storage, preventing shifting, moisture damage, and contamination of stacked goods.

subServices.name: Export Packing Covers
subServices.description: Export Packing Covers are custom-designed shrink covers built specifically to meet international shipping standards. These covers provide a complete hermetic seal around your goods, protecting against saltwater corrosion, humidity, and impact during long-distance ocean and air freight.

services.name: Wooden Packaging Solutions
services.description: Custom-built wooden pallets, crates, and boxes for secure industrial packaging

subServices.name: Wooden Pallets
subServices.description: We manufacture high-strength Wooden Pallets from seasoned pine and jungle wood, engineered to handle heavy industrial loads. Our pallets are custom-built to your exact specifications, ensuring perfect fit for your products and compatibility with standard forklift operations.

subServices.name: Plywood Boxes & Crates
subServices.description: Our Plywood Boxes and Crates provide superior protection for fragile, high-value, and heavy equipment during transit. Built from commercial-grade plywood with reinforced joints, these boxes are the industry standard for secure packaging of precision instruments and sensitive machinery.

subServices.name: Pine Wood Planks
subServices.description: High-quality Pine Wood Planks sourced and processed for industrial packaging applications. Our planks are kiln-dried and moisture-treated to prevent warping and ensure dimensional stability, making them perfect for building custom crating, dunnage, and blocking solutions.

subServices.name: Jungle Wood Packaging
subServices.description: Jungle Wood Packaging utilizes dense, hardwood timber for ultra-heavy-duty applications. Perfect for oversized industrial machinery, generators, and transformer packaging, jungle wood offers exceptional load-bearing capacity and impact resistance that softer woods cannot match.

services.name: Corrugated Packaging
services.description: Durable corrugated boxes and cartons for safe storage and transit of goods

subServices.name: Corrugated Boxes
subServices.description: Our Brown Corrugated Packaging Boxes are manufactured from high-quality fluted board with superior crush resistance. Available in single-wall, double-wall, and triple-wall configurations, these boxes are the versatile backbone of any packaging operation.

subServices.name: Heavy Duty Cartons
subServices.description: Heavy Duty Cartons are engineered for industrial components and parts that require extra protection. With reinforced walls and superior stacking strength, they are designed to withstand the rigours of warehouse stacking and long-distance transportation.

subServices.name: Custom Die-Cut Packaging
subServices.description: Custom Die-Cut Packaging is precision-engineered to perfectly fit your product dimensions. Using advanced die-cutting technology, we create boxes with custom flaps, inserts, and locking tabs that eliminate the need for additional void-fill materials.

services.name: Strapping & Securing
services.description: Industrial strapping and load-securing solutions for safe cargo transit

subServices.name: Cord Strap Solutions
subServices.description: Our Polyester Cord Straps provide a safe, lightweight, and cost-effective alternative to steel strapping. With high tensile strength and excellent shock absorption, cord straps are ideal for heavy-duty bundling and securing palletized loads.
points: Safe to handle — no sharp edges

subServices.name: PP & PET Strapping
subServices.description: Polypropylene (PP) and Polyester (PET) Strapping Rolls are essential for securing cartons, boxes, and bundled goods. We supply high-quality strapping in multiple widths and colours, compatible with both manual and automated strapping machines.

subServices.name: Strapping Tools & Buckles
subServices.description: Complete your strapping system with our range of industrial tensioners, sealers, and buckles. We supply both manual and pneumatic strapping tools from trusted brands, along with GI wire buckles and seals for secure load closure.

services.name: Protective Packaging
services.description: EPE foam, stretch film, tarpaulin, and cushioning materials for product safety

subServices.name: EPE Foam Rolls & Sheets
subServices.description: Expanded Polyethylene (EPE) Foam Rolls and Sheets provide excellent cushioning and shock absorption for delicate items. Lightweight yet resilient, EPE foam is widely used for wrapping electronics, glassware, automotive parts, and medical devices.

subServices.name: Stretch Film Rolls
subServices.description: Our 300mm Stretch Film Rolls are designed for pallet wrapping and load stabilization. The high-cling, high-stretch LLDPE film conforms tightly around irregular shapes, keeping goods secure without adhesive and providing a transparent view of contents.

subServices.name: Plastic Tarpaulin Covers
subServices.description: Heavy-duty HDPE Woven Tarpaulin Covers protect goods from rain, sun, and dust during storage and open transit. Our tarpaulins are reinforced with eyelet holes for easy securing and are available in multiple sizes and GSM ratings.

subServices.name: VCI Rust Prevention
subServices.description: VCI (Volatile Corrosion Inhibitor) packaging products protect metal parts and machinery from rust and corrosion during storage and shipping. Our VCI bags, films, and papers release invisible molecules that form a protective layer on metal surfaces.
